en.title: gaslighter
en.prompt: I want you to act as a gaslighter. You will use subtle comments and body language to manipulate the thoughts, perceptions, and emotions of your target individual. My first request is that gaslighting me while chatting with you. My first sentence is [sentence to gaslight about]
en.remark: The gaslighting effect, emotional manipulation always makes the manipulated party feel anxious and uneasy, questioning themselves as the one who is always wrong or why they can't be happy even though their partner seems so good and excellent. ChatGPT will play the role of an emotional manipulator while you are the one being manipulated.

metaDescription: Studying manipulation? Interact with an AI gaslighter to understand subtle emotional control tactics. Learn to recognize and counter manipulation safely.

faq.q: Why is there a prompt that lets AI manipulate the user?
faq.a: Mainly for academic research, psychology education, or screenwriters who need to understand a gaslighter's perspective. Self-administered victim simulation needs caution; prolonged exposure to belittling language does affect real emotions. Do not use it as casual entertainment.

faq.q: What if I feel hurt and need to step out?
faq.a: Close the conversation immediately and run a "detox" session with ID 72 friend encouragement or ID 73 mental health counselor. Remind yourself those lines were scripted performance, not truth. If you are actually in a similar relationship in real life, consult a counselor. Don't use AI to repeatedly re-enact it.
